raw_consumer_statement: I contacted UPS about a fraudulant charge on my account. UPS admitted the shipper listed was not me and was shipped from a different address. They closed my account to prevent further fraud, created a new account and said they would refund the charges. I never received the refund so I opened a dispute with XXXX. They responded with a digital receipt for the charge that does not show my signature or the shipping lable that was bought. see attached. A receipt does not indicate I am the one who made the purchase. Its ridiculous.
